payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Will be this coming Friday after this, August 10th, at 7:00pm Pacific. You can watch both of these streams at twitch.tv/criticalrole and if you miss the livestream, they'll be available on our YouTube a few days after the stream, so look for that. For more details and a link to the NPC survey-- a lot of the people in the community have been helping us forge this community-made NPC that will end up becoming part of the world that we run-- go to critrole.com. Another huge announcement that has taken a lot of blood, sweat, and tears from this wonderful man, Taliesin, here, and this wonderful man, Liam O'Brien, over here. We're excited to announce our coming sequel to our art book, The Chronicles of Exandria. [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But seriously, they are giving away a Legendary Bundle on their Facebook page, and they're offering up a special discount code, GENCON2018, for 25% off any digital products. Okay, I'm done!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Thank you, Sam. And thank you, our friends at D&D Beyond. Few other quick announcements to get through. My fireside chat that was part of our fantastic 826LA charity run we did a couple months back will be this coming Tuesday, August 7th, at 5:00pm Pacific, where I'll be answering a bunch of your questions and generally hanging out with the community for about an hour or more. So hope to have you there. We'll have Marisha's Honey Heist 2: Electric Beargaloo-- [cheering]

payload.trigger_phrase: You make your way to the top
payload.raw_text: As Caleb begins to fumble his way up the stairs, Keg coasts up past him, double Haste speed, clanging all the way. Frumpkin can hear this from the top floor. You hear this heavy sound of like two giant bags of pots and pans. (clanking) You make your way to the top.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: While I ask Frumpkin to continue along the right path.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: Do I need to make a stealth check?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: You would if you want to stay quiet, yes. With disadvantage.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: All right, let's do it. Four. That's going to go ahead and-- yeah, it's four. A nine?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: There doesn't look to be anything about the stonework or beneath the bed at Frumpkin's level that looks out of the ordinary. Frumpkin briefly leaps up onto the edge of the bed and you can see the bed, while it was once well made, seems to have been worn-- the actual cushion is sagged pretty heavy in the center-- it looks like it's been slept in for quite some time.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Quickly, do I see anything of note in this room?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You know Caduceus, I think there's actually merit to your plan. I'm kind of into it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Two escaped prisoners, one got them out. Damn shame.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Damn shame.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm not following, what are we doing? Am I an escaped prisoner?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, we got an-- you really not following? I felt like that was really clear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Just stay here in case-- when Caleb and Keg get back.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You're going to go attack these people with--?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to see if I can get them to leave the house and if they don't leave the house, then I think you should probably shoot them with that thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We're going to have them chase the escaped prisoners.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right. Sounds good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As this is transpiring, what did you roll for a perception check?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I understand that, but not every transformation is impervious to scrutiny. "Wait... shit, we've been infiltrated!" He pulls his other blade out, the guy behind him goes ahead and pulls out his blade as well. Roll initiative. [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, that's a one.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh no.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to hide, just in case they come this way.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As Nott darts around the corner, you suddenly hit what feels like a wall at first. But it's softer and covered in material. You look up to see one of the hooded lackeys of the Iron Shepherds who had just come around the other side. Goes, "What the fuck?" and pulls out his short sword.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I grab Nott by the scruff and lift him away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Her you mean?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Her, oh thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Mr. Clay, I am a woman, I know you're new here. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's a whole conversation there that I'm excited to have when we're not having, okay-- We need one for questioning man. We caught one of them.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let me go! I didn't do nothing wrong.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Nope, no, we got you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I say shut up you miscreant and I backhand Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (cries out)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. I'll say make a deception check Caduceus, with advantage because you've been given help from your friends.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: My deception-- That's 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's going to roll. He's going to do something.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They both stop and glance and look at this, and the one that Nott had bumped into leans forward-- you can see his squared, scarred chin where none of his facial hair grows from some sort of deep wound he had received at a younger age. You see his eyes, these deep, sunken brown irises staring back, as he goes "I don't think I've ever seen you around here before."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I have his face though. I have the face of the one-- I'm not wearing a costume, am I?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: "I have his face though."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I mean I look like one of the guards.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, he had the disguise spell.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: At this point, Keg, you've just come down the stairs. Roll initiative for me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: As he backs up, I'm going to take his head and slam it back into the wall he just ran into.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it. Attack rolls have have advantage now because he is stunned.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Good, because that was a natural one. 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You're a beast!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's still standing, but he's looking pretty beat up and he's just making vowel sounds now. Speech isn't capable given the series of events that have transpired.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to say  Shut up! And crack him across the face again with my bonus, my off-handed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Also with advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That was a Gil, but he did good. 19.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That hits, roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Nine damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you're like, "Shh!" (crunching noises)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Shh, go to sleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Just repeatedly slamming his head into the stone until his arms go limp. You slide his face across the stone as he collapses to the ground. [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to take my scarf, wipe the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you're doing that, the guy behind him, who was his backup, sees this happen, because his initiative's next in the order, and he turns and runs. [laughter, cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He goes at a full run and then a dash, so he's about 60 feet away from you down the hallway getting near the front doors of the fortress.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to shout out  Hey Keg, we got a runner! I don't know if she heard me or not.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Well, now that we're entering combat, and everybody's there, it's time to roll initiative. Everyone, roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The hand slowly pulls the gag away from the mouth. Khary, if you'd like to join us at the table? [roaring applause]

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: The murmuring!

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Well, I don't know about you people, but I'm tired of this stabbing feeling.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The rest of you, what are you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Not hearing Caleb for a while, I'm going to, again, creep down the hallway and peek around a bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, go ahead. Take your time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can we do the thing? The Brady Bunch where all of our heads are stacked while we peek around the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Screw it, I'm going to come too. I'm sorry!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can you do some magicky things, Mr. Clay? Something?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's an eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As the three of your heads poke around the corner, all three of you shift as Keg slams into from behind. Both of their heads, who were currently bickering, of Protto and Ruzza look back towards the front. "Shit, they're here! Back up!" They both begin to retract and back up into the chamber behind them.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I shoot?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you'd like to.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I would like to shoot.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I also have a thing I'd like to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll shoot at-- it's Protto and Ruzza?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: With The Duchess now perched upon the wall, you can see, creeping around the side, the tiny goblin face of Nott and Beauregard, hood up around the edge. For the first time in a day or two, you sense the tide turning in your favor. All right. 20 to 15, anybody?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I shoot?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you'd like to.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I would like to shoot.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I also have a thing I'd like to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll shoot at-- it's Protto and Ruzza?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, now that we're entering combat, and everybody's there, it's time to roll initiative. Everyone, roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Ugh, farts.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Nope!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Nope. That's not good.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Probably for the best.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty, do we have-- (laughs) 25 to 20?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Oh, oh! I rolled a natural 19, so I'm pretty sure that puts me at--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What's your dexterity bonus?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Plus three, so yes I am.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. 22. You are tied with Ruzza.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: It's so nice to see familiar faces.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Keg comes through that. You have advantage on this because Beauregard is helping you because she's holding her action to help with that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I come around the gate. I look in and I go, hey, Shakäste!

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Hello, darling.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What's up? What're you doing out here?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Well, you know, vacationing.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: More like a staycation.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to hold my action and start wedging my staff up under the door, and maybe Deuces can help me crank it open.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm actually going to turn around and start searching that hallway.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Cool, man. Yeah. I'm not doing something really important here to keep our friends from reaching their peril.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You hold your action to try to wedge it, look back for his help, and you see him turn the other direction and start walking away. Are you going to continue with your action or still hold it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Real cool, man. Keg?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to try to pull a Nila and fucking rip that shit open with my bare hands. We will see! Come on, baby. No whammies.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You start to just trace the stonework with your fingers and then find this really fascinating bit of moss. Soft green, it's been growing in the crevice. You haven't seen this type of moss before.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The bars begin to pull open ever so slightly, but not enough. You do feel, however, that whatever weight is carrying it down, it's heavy, but with two people you might have a chance of lifting it. But it looks like the bars are too thick to try and pull apart.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I did the wrong-- We should-- Under's better.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's okay. With our legs... lower back, you know.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That ends Keg's turn. Caduceus.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I want to search this little hallway for a switch or some kind of panel to open this thing from this side.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All right. Is there anything I can do?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's so calm under pressure. He's like a walking quaalude. [laughter]

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, no. I don't find anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What'd you get?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: After adding my negative investigation number, it's a one.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Top of the turn, that brings us to Shakäste and Ruzza. Now, she's going first because she's a little quicker than you on this one. Ruzza's going to... Let's see here... Yeah, she's going to Vicious Mockery. That's a fun one. Looking through at Shakäste, since you're the one who stepped out of the cage, and they had seen you there for a bit, looks over to you and goes, "Oh, I'm sorry. Were our bedding arrangements not good enough for you? Oh, we can arrange for a much better place to sleep, about six feet beneath this." Make a wisdom saving throw, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I did the wrong-- We should-- Under's better.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's okay. With our legs... lower back, you know.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That ends Keg's turn. Caduceus.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I want to search this little hallway for a switch or some kind of panel to open this thing from this side.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All right. Is there anything I can do?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's so calm under pressure. He's like a walking quaalude. [laughter]

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, no. I don't find anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What'd you get?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: After adding my negative investigation number, it's a one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You start to just trace the stonework with your fingers and then find this really fascinating bit of moss. Soft green, it's been growing in the crevice. You haven't seen this type of moss before.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Hey, fella. Hi friend.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You forget for the moment what you're doing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What? Oh. Yeah.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Finishing Caleb's go, it is now Protto's turn. Protto is going to go ahead and dart back around the corner, ducks beneath Nefertiti and then is going to take two shots at Beauregard but because it is between two portcullises he has disadvantage on the strikes. There is only one he can currently see down this long hallway. So the first shot is a natural 20 but disadvantage. That is a nine plus six. That is a 15 to hit. What's your armor class?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Just for the hell of it, make an athletics check for me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Always fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What could go wrong? Big six.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You manage to make it most of the way over but its a relatively heavy table for your size and diminutive form.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have average strength.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can probably get it there by the end of next round but you're in process.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Aw, there's a tiny table you can move.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "They hurt." You can see he looks weak. He probably hasn't eaten well in a number of days. As part of the process of mentally conditioning those they capture, it's minimal sustenance and a lot of mental and psychological damage, as well as physical torture to go along with it. You've seen and endured some of it, but looks like some of these other figures have gone through more of it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: All right, here we go!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, what about these people in the cage?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I was thinking, maybe can I investigate these people that are in the cage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. You walk up to it, and there are the two people, the small child and the dwarf, in the previous chamber where you were locked, and in the chamber you just discovered there appears to be an older gentleman in his maybe late fifties, early sixties or so. Looks pretty bruised up; one eye is swollen shut, the other looks pretty bloodied as well. He's chained from behind and has the gag in his mouth, as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Can I at least get in to move close enough that I could get the gag out of his mouth?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. You go ahead and pull it free-- "(gasping, panting) Who are you?"

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: We're friends. We're going to get you out of here. How are the bindings on your hands?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: An eight. As you come down with your battleaxe, you all hear the resounding (crash) as it slams into the wood, splintering and breaking it a bit. You can see a brief gap where you've managed to get two of the wooden boards to separate and start to splinter. You're starting to go full Shining on this door. With that impact, over the next moment, with repeated hits, you definitely can see your ability to cut through this.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Jusca.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm just a farmer, I don't know why they took me." He pulls against the constraints from behind. "Can you get me out? Can you get me out, please?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We are just giving them time to be ready for us. We need to proceed.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we need to move. Sorry about your ears, grandpa! Then I smack the door with my hammer.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, make an attack roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You're the worst person.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) I am, I'm sorry. The door, with my axe.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Door, yeah. Make an attack roll for the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's a 20. Not a natural, just a--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, no; that hits. Go ahead, roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to use Mage Hand to unbind his hands.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, go ahead and roll dexterity.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Oh, nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's an eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (whispering) 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 14? It takes you a little bit, but you do manage to get the manacles off the back of his body. You rolled a?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: An eight. Damage.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: 17.It's going to take you a bit. You're starting to get through it, but these cages are designed to be hard to pick. You take the better part of a minute to do so. In the meantime, you--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Can I do it again--? Can I get through?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. As that's happening, the bindings are now freed, and Jusca brings his wrists up and rubs them. You can see where the strain has caused red, bloodied lines across from the tension where he's pulled against the restraints. Sallow, this long-bearded chin out of neglect. He looks up with a faint glimmer of hope and a smile to the rest of you, and says "Oh, tha-- thank you."

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: He's still in the cage--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Still in the cage, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Still locked in the cage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Should I try to unlock that thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it. Roll a d20. Plus your dex bonus, and your proficiency bonus. It'd be plus... six, I think?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Six? So 17.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: 15? Okay. In the moment, the sense of intimidation that your previous employer, Lorenzo, had held over you, and all the memories of what transpired on the Glory Run Road not but a day before goes running through your mind, and you feel that cold sense of fear, that urge to run creep up once more. And you close your eyes tightly and shrug it off. For the first time in the face of this-- [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Tinnitus?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Tennis elbow you've ever felt. At that minute, a voice, familiar, creeps in again in the space around you. "What are you planning to accomplish? You've killed a few bottom-barrel goons, but you're in my domain now. I had first planned to make you into premium contraband when finished. However, I may just keep you all as my own personal pets." Make a wisdom saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ugh.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Caleb is silently making the jerk-off motion in the room they are standing in. [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's get this door open.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I have to make a saving throw, Matt?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a wisdom saving throw, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, no!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You've got this.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Come on, baby; character development! 15?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: (creaking) It begins to bend. You can see now where they've left it to lock behind, it latches when it's dropped. And where the latch has stuck in, it's been locked underneath. It's starting to pull apart. The metal is bending. It's not strong enough to break; it will take another round to do so, but it's starting to give.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's one of those--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (whoosh) A cone of flame just bursts forward from the brazier in your direction. I need you to make a dexterity saving throw, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh. I rolled a two. So nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You take ten points of fire damage as it just incinerates past you. And you take a step back, and the flame is now super small. Like it just expended a lot of its fire energy. In the brazier it's just this low flicker. And it begins to burn brighter again--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Aah! While it's going, I'm going to see if I can yank open the thing!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, go ahead and make a strength check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (whining) Can I do athletics? [laughter]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is a straight strength check unfortunately, sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Um, I'd prefer a nature check?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Just roll a d20, add your--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Don't fuck me...

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Gil!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All righty, yeah. So that's five temporary-- sorry, your hit point maximum increases by five for the next eight hours for Beau, Keg, and who else?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We're back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Do we have a winner from the giveaway?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Are we back online again?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I think we're back on the stream. I have not been given a winner. All right, we'll get it done in chat. Whoever won, congratulations. You'll find out soon.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are we on the internet right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I think we are.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're on?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We're on. We're live. [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. Bringing us back in, getting the music going.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I just got so nervous.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Oh god.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh god.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Any other preparation you guys want to do before you descend the stairs?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: I would like to render Aid to three friends of mine.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You'd like to what?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: I have an Aid spell that before we go into the fray, I believe these two beautiful ladies have been taking a lot of the brunt of damage and deserve a little something extra. So I say they take Aid--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 2nd-level? The base level?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Level two.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: From looking inside and seeing some of the chamber-- I'll give you a little more of a view of what's inside.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The Duchess heads down into the chamber, and it opens into a T-shaped chamber facing your direction. The stairs here descend down into this area. The room is low-lit with a red glow emanating from two furnaces, one on each side there with faint red embers and bits of ash that flicker out with small bits of flame.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Now I don't want my baby to go too far, okay? Just let her see what's--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hovering right there?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: I'd say yeah. Just enough to stay in the shadow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, make a stealth check for your Duchess. Roll a d20, add two.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Aw, buddy.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: One.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Duchess perches right in the middle of the floor, right there. She's sitting right there. You think Duchess is hidden. What else do you guys do?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Well, here's the thing. If she's sitting right there in the middle, can she see better than if she were in the shadow?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: A moment passes before two more (projectiles fire). These strange, quick objects moving at a rapid speed, cross by. Another one hits the bottom of the stairs and clangs to a rest. This one you can actually see it. It appears to be a rather long, solid crossbow bolt.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: From which side?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One appears to emerge from underneath the table out this way. Another seems to shoot out from this side.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What shoots out?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: This is some Indiana Jones shit that's happening right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The image of Keg falls to the floor, clutching her shoulder.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I can make it sound-- I'm going to use Thaumaturgy to make it sound like she's in pain. So--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (groans) Oh, it hurts!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm holding the crystal up like a microphone.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Aw! Shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can you give me, like... three big deaths, three medium deaths, and three little deaths? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh! Winner! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Some open mouth, closed mouth kind of shit. I'm just going to need a lot of-- I'm going to need a palette to work with.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Ah! Aw! Agh! (laughter)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Keg, you make a perception check as well, since you're both at the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It's all weird.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're staying up behind Caleb, up in the hallway?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so your vision, with the Duchess you can see beyond that but you do not have--

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: A full--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The ability to actually hit something unless you move down below. Just a heads-up.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Caduceus?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think i'm going to-- Oh god-- We don't want all the magic in one place. That seems like a bad idea. I think I'll pull off and hug the wall to the left and get as far back from that corner as I can.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. (counting) At this moment, make a perception check, Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep, as you came down the bottom of the stairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 12. Plus nothing, Taliesin.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You look down and see the empty chamber. No movement. Beauregard, you were looking around the corner. Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god! Five. Right? That was a two, plus three. Five.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: No, now we roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Caduceus?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think i'm going to-- Oh god-- We don't want all the magic in one place. That seems like a bad idea. I think I'll pull off and hug the wall to the left and get as far back from that corner as I can.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. (counting) At this moment, make a perception check, Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep, as you came down the bottom of the stairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 12. Plus nothing, Taliesin.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You look down and see the empty chamber. No movement. Beauregard, you were looking around the corner. Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god! Five. Right? That was a two, plus three. Five.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Keg, you make a perception check as well, since you're both at the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Come on, baby. (singing) 20! [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Thank the gods.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What are you?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Keg, as you hit the wall and glance around the side, you can see a humanoid shape ducked into the shadows underneath the table in the center, who has pulled a heavy crossbow from underneath the leather and aiming it at Nott, which does attempt to shoot. That is a 17 to hit. What's your armor class?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It hits!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It hits. For that, Nott, you take eight points of piercing damage as a bolt hits right towards the kneecap and actually sticks out the side, you almost falling to one edge.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will dodge uncannily.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go. Reduce that to four. Caduceus, as you walked around the corner, you turn around to see and come face to face with Ruzza, who is back up against the corner, and looks towards you and goes, "What the fuck?!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Do I have time to do a thing?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As he flies back, further into the chamber, about 15 feet up, his back to the ceiling of the interior, that's going to end Lorenzo's turn. It is now Ruzza's turn. Ruzza, who saw you first run over there, Caduceus, is going attempt to cast Confusion on you. So I need you, Caduceus, to make a wisdom saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh! [shouts and jeers]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And as you look up into the burning red eyes of this strange ogreish-like demon creature, which you do not recognize, all you hear is the chuckle. (malicious chuckle)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Jesus...

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, it is now Lorenzo's turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That was more part of your movement, so--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: So I can hit her two more times?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Two more times, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay! 19.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 19 hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: And that is 12.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 12 does not hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: No, that's damage!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, 12 points of damage! There you go. Oof, all right.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: And then one more time, just for fun, and that will be a 16 plus seven, which I believe also hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That hits, yeah. Go ahead and roll damage again.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Come on! Big money, no whammies! Well, that was kind of a whammy: five.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, got it. Ruzza's taken a few hits and you're now starting to see blood streaks across the face from where the heavy flat side of your warhammer has smashed into her jaw. Some of the teeth seem to be cracked, and you see her spit one out onto the stone. "All right, I see your game again, Keg."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Hey, babe.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That ends your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Back, just keeping an eye. Keeping his options open, making sure he's not too far from anybody. That's going to go ahead and end Lorenzo's turn, it's now Ruzza's turn. Ruzza is going to expend a level three Hold Person--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's thinking about all of the great stuff available at D&D Beyond.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. And with that, after the scorching strikes that were against him, Lorenzo's going to coast through the air, arms out at the side wielding the giant, jagged glaive, grinning, smiling towards Caleb. (malicious laugh) And is going to arc down just enough to catch you on the outside of the glaive's range. Two strikes against you. The first one is going to be a 14 to hit?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, he's so weak!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Dead, the word is dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is going to be 14 points of slashing damage. The next is going to be a 15 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Shield! Shield! Shield!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is 15 points of slashing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are you still conscious?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (cooing) Shield! (coo)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Who hurt you?

preceding_turns.speaker: AUDIENCE MEMBER
preceding_turns.text: Lorenzo!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And with that, he's going to go ahead and shift further--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh no.

payload.raw_text: There goes Nott. That brings us to Beau! What are you doing? You come to consciousness. You're prone. You have to use half your movement to get up.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Oh god, me? I guess I'll poke around and just take a shot. I can't do anything else! I'll run in closer so I'm within 30 feet and then fire. I miss. Bonus action fire. 18.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Then I'll run back to my cubbyhole.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: There goes Nott. That brings us to Beau! What are you doing? You come to consciousness. You're prone. You have to use half your movement to get up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ending Caduceus' turn. Shakäste, you are stable. You can still move if you want.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to back up against the one in the corner so I have a little bit of cover.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, the other corner. Yeah a little coverage, there we are.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go. Caduceus' turn's up. Shakäste, you don't have to make any death saving throws because Spare the Dying, so you're fine, but that's your turn. To the top of the round, Nott, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, me? I guess I'll poke around and just take a shot. I can't do anything else! I'll run in closer so I'm within 30 feet and then fire. I miss. Bonus action fire. 18.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 18 hits. Roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's nine points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: AUDIENCE
preceding_turns.text: Nein!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Then I'll run back to my cubbyhole.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You have advantage on the attack roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If anyone wants to physically attack him. Yeah, in melee. Or actually, for stunned, attack rolls have advantage, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Attack rolls.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Lay it on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's my fault for not having him fly to the ceiling last turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I turn around and with all the rage, popping blood vessels, I say: (shouting) Fuck him up! [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Caleb and Keg?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Ah-- I would like to push myself up the stairs as far as I can, while still being able to have a bead on him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Any higher up the stairs and you won't be able to see him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Then I will collapse onto my ass on the stairs and make that symbol shape thing that Fjord used to make, and go: Ey, buddy. I will send out another Fire Bolt.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, it is now Lorenzo's turn. Lorenzo shrugs off the stun at the end, but can do nothing else on his turn, and is still locked. As soon as he gets his ability to speak back, goes, "Oh, y'all being tricksy. I like it." That's going to bring us to Caduceus.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I would like to fuck him up, if I may? If I could? [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: All right, here we go! Don't fuck me! Yes, 20, bam. Bing bam boom.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: They all have advantage, so roll twice.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you are right. Okay, that was still better. That's seven points of damage to start. Nope. Yep. 19, and I crit on a 19! [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I forget what I do when I crit. I just double it, okay. Oh, that's sad. Six. Bummer. Okay, here we go. Nope. 14 doesn't hit, does it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 14 does not hit. Unable to penetrate the hide with that third strike. It hits the outside of the muscular blubber on his giant torso and it shimmies and shakes and then tightens. All right, that ends your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's that.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. I'll give you some cover on that. Finishing Caduceus' turn, Shakäste, you are conscious now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Here's the question  does the potion also get my bonus?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, because it's not your healing spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I figured not, but I thought it was worth asking.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (nasally voice) It's worth an inquiry. Most definitely!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I wish that was Lorenzo's voice.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to give you a potion, and let's see what I roll. That's (counting) 15 hit points. You're awake again. I'm going to use the rest of my movement to get some cover behind the table, I suppose, is the closest cover I've got right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You could push it. The table is righted now, so it's an empty space.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm getting partial cover.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You wish you had saved it. She used it last session and they didn't take a short rest. Sorry, guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16 just hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And that's seven damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nice. He's looking real hurt.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Keg?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Keg!

preceding_turns.speaker: AUDIENCE
preceding_turns.text: (chanting) Keg!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Come on!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay, here we go! Not a great start. 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You go to swing, now being wounded and looking-- a glare of desperation in the burning red eyes of Lorenzo. You swing and he grabs the hilt of your weapon as it swings downward, and holds it aloft and in your face and goes, "Try it."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay! Fuck! Nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: AUDIENCE
preceding_turns.text: Nein!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. The other hand grabs the other weapon, and you're just locked in that moment now.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Last one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Keg!

preceding_turns.text: Okay, come on, come on, come on! Six?

preceding_turns.text: All righty. [groaning]

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (singing) I really wish I'd saved that action surge. [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: No! I wish I had saved it.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You wish you had saved it. She used it last session and they didn't take a short rest. Sorry, guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16 just hits.

preceding_turns.text: And that's seven damage.

preceding_turns.text: Nice. He's looking real hurt.

payload.raw_text: Gathering up the rest of those who were captured by the Iron Shepherds, Shakäste shepherds them off to their proper locations, free and far from the confines, outside of the Dwendalian Empire. The rest of you, with your friends in tow, make your way back towards Shadycreek Run and to the rest of the morning light, which now begins to slowly curl over the distant mountains. A long evening, exhausted and tired. You look forward to enjoying comfort, alcohol, and whatever else transpired thereafter.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: At least for a drunken bender. Tonight, you want to stay with me? [cheering]

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: You can sneak out in the morning, if you want. It won't be weird.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah, that sounds good. Yeah, totally! Cool, cool, cool, cool.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: What was it Shakäste just said? Get yourself something nice?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns_last5.text: You know what is happening. Keg is aroused.
